title: Lentil Mujadara Stir Fry
description: A unique fusion of Middle Eastern lentil mujadara and Chinese stir fry, perfect for a quick weeknight dinner.

ingredients.name: flavorful oil
ingredients.notes: such as peanut or vegetable oil

ingredients.name: middle eastern spices
ingredients.notes: such as cumin, coriander, and paprika

instructions: Heat the flavorful oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the garlic and ginger and stir-fry until fragrant, about 30 seconds.
Add the cooked lentil mujadara and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add the middle eastern spices and Chinese five-spice (if using) and stir-fry for another minute.
Add the soy sauce and sesame oil (if using) and stir-fry for a final minute.
Transfer the mixture to a serving platter and garnish with chopped scallions.
If desired, serve with steamed vegetables or rice.
